name: S7: Statin Paradox — New-User Baseline Comparison
description: Baseline covariate profile comparison between new simvastatin and new atorvastatin initiators. Evaluates demographic, clinical, and pharmacological balance to validate the active comparator new-user design for the Statin Paradox study.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing demographic, clinical, and pharmacological profiles of new simvastatin vs new atorvastatin users across demographics, conditions, drugs, measurements, procedures, and visits in the 365 days prior to index.
